scripts.setup: npm install && npm install --prefix frontend && uv sync --project backend --dev
scripts.db:migrate: uv run --project backend alembic -c backend/alembic.ini upgrade head
scripts.dev: npm run db:migrate && concurrently -n frontend,backend -c cyan,green "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "uv run --project backend uvicorn backend.api.app:create_app --factory --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000"
